policy.revision_policy: Every snapshot is pinned to a full 40-character Hugging Face commit SHA.
policy.license_notice: License identifiers reproduce the pinned repository card or MTEB task metadata. They do not replace source-level rights, attribution, privacy, or redistribution review.

contamination_grades.low: Released after the principal comparison-model cutoff; source overlap and near-duplicate audits are still required.
contamination_grades.medium: Public benchmark or corpus that may have appeared in model pretraining; use only as a regression/coverage evaluation.
contamination_grades.high: Known benchmark-family, source-family, or current-project training overlap; diagnostic evaluation only and never a clean claim.

download_tiers.small: Download the complete pinned snapshot with --small.
download_tiers.metadata_first: Download only README, queries, qrels, and metadata with --metadata; --all is required for the complete corpus.

assets.purpose: Korean monolingual and Korean-English/English-Korean product-QA retrieval regression.
assets.contamination_notes: Human-annotated public ACL 2023 benchmark; possible pretraining exposure. Add every query and corpus text to the benchmark blocklist.

assets.license_evidence: MTEB task metadata and upstream FLORES terms
assets.purpose: Korean multilingual bitext-mining and cross-lingual embedding regression across FLORES languages.
assets.contamination_notes: Widely published 2022 benchmark and likely pretraining-visible. Treat Korean and all paired-language rows as blocked evaluation text.

assets.license_evidence: MTEB KorSarcasmClassification.v2 task metadata; the pinned materialized dataset card omits a license field
assets.purpose: Korean social-text sarcasm classification regression using frozen embeddings.
assets.contamination_notes: Public 2018-2019 Twitter-derived benchmark; likely web/pretraining exposure and unsuitable for a clean claim.

assets.license_evidence: MTEB KorHateClassification.v2 task metadata; the pinned materialized dataset card omits a license field
assets.purpose: Korean toxic-speech classification regression using frozen embeddings.
assets.contamination_notes: Public BEEP benchmark from 2018-2020 Korean news comments; possible pretraining and benchmark exposure.

assets.license_evidence: Pinned Hugging Face dataset card and MTEB task metadata
assets.purpose: Korean finance aspect-sentiment classification coverage regression.
assets.contamination_notes: MTEB evaluates the training split and the data includes KLUE-TC and Naver Finance sources; the project already uses related KLUE/performance families.

assets.license_evidence: Pinned Hugging Face dataset card and MTEB task metadata
assets.purpose: Fine-grained Korean multilabel hate-speech classification regression.
assets.contamination_notes: Public K-MHaS/COLING 2022 benchmark built from 2018-2020 online news comments; possible pretraining exposure.

assets.purpose: Korean semantic-pair and NLI embedding regression, including the XNLI-derived evaluation split.
assets.contamination_notes: Translated SNLI/MultiNLI training data and public XNLI validation/test data are widely exposed benchmark families. Never report as clean zero-shot evidence.

assets.purpose: Large Korean offensiveness, target, and rationale classification coverage probe using frozen embeddings.
assets.contamination_notes: Public EMNLP 2023 dataset of 2021 Korean news comments; possible pretraining exposure despite being additional to the current protocol.

assets.license_evidence: Pinned Hugging Face dataset card; constituent KOGL Type 1 and official legal-portal attribution still requires source-level review
assets.purpose: Recent Korean public-document text retrieval, page retrieval, OCR robustness, and long structured-document evaluation.
assets.contamination_notes: Released with a November 2025 paper and human-verified generated queries. Audit exact and near overlap against current legal/public training before calling it clean.

assets.license_evidence: Pinned Hugging Face dataset card; each underlying public report still requires source-level attribution and rights review
assets.purpose: Recent Korean cybersecurity document retrieval, multi-page reasoning, and image-to-markdown OCR robustness evaluation.
assets.contamination_notes: Released in January 2026 with generated queries, false-negative filtering, and human quality control. Audit source-document overlap before a clean claim.

assets.license_evidence: Pinned Hugging Face dataset card; each underlying public report still requires source-level attribution and rights review
